title: cincinalis aquilina
intro: Cincinalis aquilina, also known as goldenseal, is a perennial plant native to North America that belongs to the Berberidaceae family. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its alkaloids, particularly berberine, which have antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of goldenseal include treating digestive issues, respiratory infections, and skin conditions, as well as supporting immune function. Goldenseal can be prepared as a tincture, capsule, or tea, and is often combined with other herbs in herbal preparations for enhanced medicinal effects.
